case_title: STANLEY DINTCHO, DDS VS. KAOUTAR BELLAOUCHI

docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL PLAINTIFF APPROVED**

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-16-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-10-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF STANLEY DINTCHO, DDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAOUTAR BELLAOUCHI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-10-2023 - CONTINUED FOR APPEARANCE OF PLAINTIFF TO APR-21-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT KAOUTAR BELLAOUCHI IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF SENT AN UNAUTHORIZED PARTY TO REPRESENT HIM IN COURT. MATTER SHALL BE CONTINUED FOR THE PLAINTIFF TO MAKE AN APPEARANCE. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER CONTIUNED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION.

ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-21-2023 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-02-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506
